session_summary: Lane B: Renderer Architecture & Resilience — completed. Created centralized constants module (packages/app/src/constants/index.ts) with only duplicated values: DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL, CHANGELOG_URL, DEFAULT_PORT/DEFAULT_URL, TIMEOUTS, STORAGE_KEYS. Created AppErrorBoundary component (packages/app/src/components/error-boundary.tsx) that wraps SolidJS ErrorBoundary with Sentry integration and reuses existing ErrorPage. Wrapped all 3 routes in app.tsx with AppErrorBoundary for per-route crash isolation. Fixed Window.api interface in app.tsx by adding 8 missing methods (recordFatalRendererError, openLink, openDirectoryPickerDialog, checkUpdate, installUpdate, runUpdater, getDefaultServerUrl, setDefaultServerUrl, githubOAuthCallback) that the renderer code actually uses. Replaced all hardcoded opencode.ai/desktop-feedback URLs in error.tsx, home.tsx, layout.tsx with DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL constant. Replaced hardcoded CHANGELOG_URL in highlights.tsx with imported constant. Replaced hardcoded port 4096 and localhost URLs in entry.tsx with DEFAULT_URL/DEFAULT_PORT. Replaced inline storage key strings with STORAGE_KEYS constants. Replaced inline timeout values in server-health.ts with TIMEOUTS constants. All existing tests pass (0 failures). TypeScript type errors are all pre-existing in prompt-input.tsx and composer-picker.tsx (files from other lanes).
next_steps: Next convergent work: (1) Consider creating a shared ElectronAPI type that both preload/types.ts and app.tsx's Window.api derive from to stay in sync automatically, (2) Extract the withFallback pattern from settings.tsx into a reusable hook, (3) Investigate error logging improvements — structured error logging to aid debugging of route-level crashes.
